PKC 2027

March 1-4, 2027

Taipei, Taiwan

  • Home
  • Technical program
    Call for papers AI tool policy Paper submission
  • Sponsors
  • Contact

PKC 2027 will take place in Taipei, Taiwan on March 1-4, 2027. PKC 2027 is organized by the International Association for Cryptologic Research (IACR). This will be the 30th annual conference on public key cryptography.

Important dates

Aug 3, 2026

Submission deadline

Sep 28, 2026

First round notification

Oct 5, 2026

Rebuttal deadline

Nov 19, 2026

Final notification

Dec 10, 2026

Final versions due

Mar 1, 2027

Conference begins

All deadlines are 23:59:59 anywhere on earth (AoE)

Website updates

Apr 17, 2026

Website launched. Please note that the conference dates are currently tentative. The call for papers is available at this time.
